title: AI4Pain 2026 — train/val signals (private)
subtitle: BVP / EDA / RESP / SpO2 segments from the AI4Pain 2026 challenge
description: Private mirror of the AI4Pain 2026 challenge train + validation splits, used for personal model training and experimentation. Each subject contributes 12 NoPain + 12 PainArm + 12 PainHand 10-second segments at 100 Hz across 4 channels.
